COUNSEL'S OCTOBER 9, 2020 DECLARATION STATING THAT HE SENT AN EMAIL TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL THE SAME DAY HE FILED THIS DEMURRER, IS INSUFFICIENT. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 10, 2020. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)
